title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how the company is deploying agent systems across the entire software development lifecycle, including bug triage, security review, and growth experiments. The talk addresses breaking through the 40% productivity plateau that many companies hit with AI coding assistants, arguing that the broader SDLC rather than code generation alone is the bottleneck.
